Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Continued To Mar-19-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Adam Shearer, Esq. for Plaintiff Sarah White;
David Lerch, Esq. for Defendants National Center for APEC and Pacific Summit Resources LLC;
Daniel Marcus, Esq. for Defendant CW Worldwide Meetings, Inc.

Hearing re: Defendants National Center For APEC, Pacfic Summit Resources LLC's Demurrer To Complaint.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court affirmed the tentative ruling as follows:

The Demurrer of Defendants National Center for APEC ("NCAPEC") and Pacific Summit Resources, LLC ("PSR") is OVERRULED in its entirety.

Order signed.

Judge: John M. True III. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (302/JMT)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2026 Continued To Mar-12-26 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court having received timely contest of the tentative ruling continues the matter as follows:

DEFENDANTS NATIONAL CENTER FOR APEC and PACIFIC SUMMIT RESOURCES LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT:

the matter will be heard on March 12, 2026 at 1:00 p.m before Judge True in department 302.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
